name: Turkey and Cheese Quiche (Low Fat!)
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces 98% fat free sliced smoked turkey or ham
1/2 cup shredded reduced fat cheddar cheese
1/4 cup finely chopped yellow or red onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Spray a pie plate (10 x 1 1/2 inches) with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Beat together rice, chives, and egg white in a bowl until combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie plate, spreading evenly on the bottom and sides of the dish.
5. Bake for 5 minutes only.
6. Cut turkey into small pieces and sprinkle over the top of the crust.
7. Beat together egg whites, cheese, and onions in another bowl.
8. Carefully pour the beaten mixture over the turkey topping.
9. Bake for about 45 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Immediately run a knife around the edge of the pie to loosen it from the plate.
11. Allow the quiche to stand for 10 minutes before serving.
12. Cut into wedges and top each wedge with a tomato slice.
